asset.title: Wiki Note Grounding
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The preview demonstrates wiki note grounding and spreadsheet syncing in NodeRoom, but the transition between the note and spreadsheet states is too abrupt.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows note grounding and spreadsheet sync, though the connection between the two states is fast.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the initial note and the resulting spreadsheet, but lacks the explicit action step in between.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode UI, but the multi-panel layout is dense and complex.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with the NodeRoom paradigm of sheets, notes, agents, and traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Appears to be a genuine product capture, though highly abbreviated.

legibility.evidence: Text in the panels is legible at standard resolution, though small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial diligence and automated spreadsheet workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Traces and agent logs are visible, showing the underlying operations honestly.

observedEvidence: Diligence note panel with sync instructions
Spreadsheet view with populated financial data
Room trace and agent logs at the bottom

defects.observed: Abrupt transition from the note view to the spreadsheet view without showing the trigger action.
defects.fix: Include intermediate frames showing the transition or the user/agent action that initiates the sync.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: NodeRoom's Wiki Note Grounding allows agents to sync and validate spreadsheet data based on collaborative diligence notes.
